markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games’ decision to delay Grand Theft Auto VI until November 19, 2026, has created a five-month window that traders are using to wager on major cultural, technological, and geopolitical milestones occurring beforehand. The extended timeline, attributed to additional polish, heightens uncertainty around outcomes like major AI model launches, album releases, or international developments, as these can shift rapidly with new announcements or data drops. Market volume reflects intense interest in high-profile events that align with the game’s cultural dominance, where historical Rockstar delays have previously amplified anticipation and shifted industry release schedules. Upcoming catalysts include potential summer tech reveals, fall music cycles, and any late-breaking industry news that could sway trader consensus before the November lock.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s New York rape retrial has reinforced trader consensus around no additional prison time, as the May 2026 deadlock leaves the key charge unresolved and reduces prospects for further convictions beyond his existing California sentence. The 73-year-old producer’s ongoing health issues and advanced age factor into assessments that any new term would likely be limited or stayed, while appeals on prior rulings continue without immediate resolution. Precursor developments, including the 2024 overturn of his original New York conviction and mixed 2025 retrial results, have shaped the current narrative of prolonged legal uncertainty without guaranteed escalation. Upcoming decisions on whether prosecutors pursue a fourth trial or pursue appeals could shift momentum, though the market currently prices in limited upside for longer sentences.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights have reached the 2026 Stanley Cup Final after dominant regular seasons and deep playoff runs, with Carolina finishing atop the Metropolitan Division at 53-22-7 while Vegas advanced through the Western Conference. The best-of-seven series stands tied 2-2 following multiple comebacks and overtime thrillers, including Carolina’s 5-3 Game 4 win and Vegas’s double-overtime victory in Game 3, which has kept implied probabilities tightly contested near even money. Both clubs’ balanced scoring, defensive structure, and resilience in high-leverage situations underpin the current trader consensus, with Game 5 on June 11 poised to shift momentum depending on goaltending and special-teams execution.

eventMetadata.context_description: The ongoing NBA Finals series between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs drives the current trader consensus, with the Knicks holding a 2-1 lead entering Game 4. New York posted a 53-29 regular-season record, advanced on an 11-game playoff win streak, and features a balanced attack led by Jalen Brunson and Karl-Anthony Towns. The Spurs finished 62-20, leaned on Victor Wembanyama’s two-way dominance alongside De’Aaron Fox and Stephon Castle, and responded with a Game 3 victory that narrowed the series deficit. Recent momentum and home-court factors in Game 4 continue to shape implied probabilities in this closely contested championship matchup.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: MegaETH airdrop by...?
events.description: this is a market on MegaETH airdrop

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France lead the field at similar implied probabilities due to their proven recent form and roster depth ahead of the 2026 tournament. Spain built on its Euro 2024 title with strong Nations League and Olympic results, though Lamine Yamal’s fitness remains a monitored factor. France benefits from an exceptionally deep squad and back-to-back final appearances, while England and Portugal have closed ground through consistent qualifying performances and attacking talent. The expanded 48-team format and North American venues add variables, keeping the top contenders tightly bunched as the wisdom of crowds prices in historical patterns and current squad health.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

events.title: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's entrenched control over the Chinese Communist Party, reinforced through ongoing anti-corruption purges of military and senior officials, underpins the 92.3% trader consensus that he will remain General Secretary through 2026. Recent official messaging, including his 2026 New Year address emphasizing Party self-governance and national priorities, signals continued dominance without visible succession signals or challenges ahead of the next Party Congress. Institutional changes abolishing term limits and sustained media centrality further reduce near-term removal risks, despite occasional unverified speculation. Traders weigh these structural factors heavily against any potential late disruptions.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The wide-open 2028 Democratic presidential nomination reflects the absence of an early frontrunner more than two years before primaries begin, with trader consensus showing Gavin Newsom at the front of a crowded field. Newsom’s position draws from his visibility as California governor, extensive fundraising infrastructure, and national media presence. Contenders such as Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez appeal to the party’s progressive base on issues including healthcare and climate policy, while Kamala Harris, Josh Shapiro, and Jon Ossoff bring establishment ties, swing-state experience, and Senate records. Differentiation centers on governing records, ideological balance, regional strength in early-voting states, and capacity to consolidate support among key voting blocs. Upcoming 2026 midterm results, primary debates, and endorsements could shift probabilities by clarifying viable paths to the nomination.
